_fill_instructions: Filled during the TRANSLATE step (Jali/Claude) from runs/<name>/answers.md. The writer never edits this file. This is the manual seam = the Fase 2 gate. Replace every <FILL: ...> value.
title: <FILL: short English title>
change_id: <FILL: perubahan persis (ID) — apa yang beda dari kanon>
internal_summary_en: <FILL: English summary used by the checker for evaluation>

violations._hint: One entry PER law actually broken. Remove this block if no law is violated.
violations.description: <FILL: how the fork breaks this law>

lineage.canon_moment: <FILL: the canon line this diverges from>

verdict: <FILL or leave empty: PASS | VALID_FORK | PRICE_REQUIRED | BLOCKED — let check-fork decide>
